title: Senior Software Engineer - Lendingkart - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lendingkart - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lendingkart family as a Senior Software Engineer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lendingkart:
Lendingkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart!
